note: The provided PDF in this workspace identifies itself as a Nissan Qashqai manual, not X-Trail.

warnings.name: e-POWER system warning light
warnings.summary: Possible malfunction in the e-POWER system.
warnings.driver_action: Stop the vehicle in a safe place immediately and contact a Nissan dealer.

warnings.name: Malfunction indicator light (MIL)
warnings.summary: Engine control system malfunction or misfire.
warnings.driver_action: If power is reduced, stop the system and tow the vehicle. Otherwise avoid speeds above 70 km/h and get service immediately.

warnings.name: Master warning light
warnings.summary: General fault or urgent message in the vehicle information display.
warnings.driver_action: Read the vehicle information display and follow the displayed instruction. Common causes include door open, parking brake, tyre pressure, key issues, and system faults.

warnings.name: Engine oil pressure warning light
warnings.summary: Engine oil pressure may be too low.
warnings.driver_action: Stop the vehicle safely as soon as possible, stop the e-POWER system immediately, and call a Nissan dealer or qualified workshop.

warnings.name: Low tyre pressure warning light
warnings.summary: One or more tyres are under-inflated or the TPMS has a fault.
warnings.driver_action: Stop safely, check all four tyres, inflate to recommended cold pressure, then drive above 25 km/h to allow TPMS reset. If the light flashes for about 1 minute, service the TPMS.

warnings.name: ABS warning light
warnings.summary: ABS may not be functioning correctly.
warnings.driver_action: Drive carefully and have the system checked by a Nissan dealer or qualified workshop.

warnings.name: Brake warning light (red)
warnings.summary: Brake system may not be working properly or brake fluid may be low.
warnings.driver_action: Stop immediately and do not continue driving until the brake system is checked.

warnings.name: Brake system warning light (yellow)
warnings.summary: Cooperative regenerative brake or electronically driven intelligent brake system may not be functioning properly.
warnings.driver_action: Drive only if safe to the nearest service point or have the vehicle towed if the red brake warning is also on.

warnings.name: Charge warning light
warnings.summary: Charging system may not be functioning properly.
warnings.driver_action: Do not continue driving if the light remains on. Have the charging system checked promptly.

warnings.name: Power limitation indicator light
warnings.summary: Vehicle power is reduced due to low battery, temperature, or system output limitation.
warnings.driver_action: Drive carefully, follow the message shown on the display, and refuel if low fuel is also present.
